name: Buttondown
description: Buttondown is a simple, powerful email newsletter service. Use it to manage subscribers, send and schedule email newsletters, organize contacts with tags, and track analytics on your campaigns.

capabilities.name: manage_subscribers
capabilities.description: List, create, update, or delete subscribers from your newsletter. Filter by status, tag, or email address.

capabilities.name: send_email
capabilities.description: Create and send a new email or draft to your subscribers. Supports markdown body, subject lines, and scheduling.

capabilities.name: list_emails
capabilities.description: Retrieve your sent and drafted emails with metadata like open rates, click rates, and send dates.

capabilities.name: manage_tags
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, or delete tags used to organize and segment your subscribers.

capabilities.name: get_newsletter_analytics
capabilities.description: Retrieve analytics and statistics for your newsletter including subscriber growth, open rates, and click-through rates.
